title: campanula rotundifolia subsp. solstitialis
intro: Campanula rotundifolia subsp. solstitialis, also known as the midsummer campanula, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the bellflower family. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to treat digestive issues, such as diarrhea and stomach cramps, due to its anti-inflammatory and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of Campanula rotundifolia subsp. solstitialis include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and alleviate symptoms of irritable bowel syndrome (IBS). In herbal preparations, the plant is typically used in teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness in treating various health conditions.
